popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description:
In the Justice book, the only note about John is that he was a "Gentleman" and that he married Lucy in about 1470.

John appears in the list of gentry for the county of Berks, returned into the excheq …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Forde Clarke III於1448年8月8日出生在英國肯特萊坦時，他的父親Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer28歲，母親Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham23歲。他於1470年與Lucia Moyle在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年7月6日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國艾可巴希爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Forde Clarke III于1448年8月8日出生在英国肯特萊坦时，他的父亲Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer28岁，母亲Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham23岁。他于1470年与Lucia Moyle在英国英格兰肯特萊坦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年7月6日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国艾可巴希爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Forde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian: from the Old Norse personal name Fróði, originally a byname from fróðr ‘knowing, well-informed’. It was revived c.1930 .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Forde Clarke III was born on 8 August 1448, in Wrotham, Kent, England, his father, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, was 28 and his mother, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, was 23. He married Lucia Moyle in 1470, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 July 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Basildon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Forde Clarke III est né le 8 août 1448, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lucia Moyle en 1470, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Basildon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Forde Clarke III am 8. August 1448 in Wrotham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer 28 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham 23. Er hat 1470 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom Lucia Moyle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juli 1497 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Basildon, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forde Clarke III è nato il il 8 agosto 1448 nel Wrotham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lucia Moyle nel 1470, nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Forde Clarke IIIが1448年8月8日にイギリスケントウロサムで生まれた時，父Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequerは28歳，母Lady Alice Elizabeth Tateshamは23歳であった。1470年にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムでLucia Moyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年7月6日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスバシルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Forde Clarke III(이)가 1448년 8월 8일 영국 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 Lucia Moyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 7월 6일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 바시던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forde Clarke III nasceu em 8 de agosto de 1448, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia Moyle em 1470, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Forde Clarke III родился 8 августа 1448 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia Moyle в 1470 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 июля 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности басаилдон, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Lucia Moyle en 1470, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas.
